meta.title: Fortune Cookie 🥠 - DopaBrain
meta.description: Crack open a fortune cookie and discover your daily fortune! Lucky numbers, colors, and wisdom.

app.title: Fortune Cookie
app.subtitle: Tap the cookie to reveal your fortune

share.title: Fortune Cookie
share.text:
My fortune cookie says: “{fortune}” 🥠
Get your fortune!

fortunes.f1: A surprise awaits you around the corner.
fortunes.f2: Your kindness will be rewarded today.
fortunes.f3: A new opportunity is about to present itself.
fortunes.f4: Trust your intuition — it knows the way.
fortunes.f5: Something wonderful is about to happen.
fortunes.f6: Today's patience will become tomorrow's strength.
fortunes.f7: An unexpected message will brighten your day.
fortunes.f8: Your creativity will solve a difficult problem.
fortunes.f9: A small act of courage will change everything.
fortunes.f10: The stars are aligned in your favor today.
fortunes.f11: Someone is thinking of you right now.
fortunes.f12: A journey of discovery begins with a single step.
fortunes.f13: Your smile will open doors you didn't know existed.
fortunes.f14: Good news is on its way to you.
fortunes.f15: Trust the timing of your life.
fortunes.f16: A forgotten dream will resurface with new meaning.
fortunes.f17: Your positive energy attracts positive outcomes.
fortunes.f18: An old friend will bring unexpected joy.
fortunes.f19: Today is the perfect day to start something new.
fortunes.f20: The universe is conspiring in your favor.
fortunes.f21: A moment of clarity will guide your next decision.
fortunes.f22: Your generosity will come back tenfold.
fortunes.f23: A pleasant surprise awaits you this week.
fortunes.f24: The answer you seek is closer than you think.
fortunes.f25: Your persistence is about to pay off.
fortunes.f26: Love is closer than you realize.
fortunes.f27: A creative breakthrough is on the horizon.
fortunes.f28: Someone will share good fortune with you soon.
fortunes.f29: Your inner strength will surprise even yourself.
fortunes.f30: Today's small victory leads to tomorrow's big success.
